questions.question: What are the Realtek Scaler I2c Commands mentioned in the synthesis?
questions.justification: The synthesis lists several Realtek Scaler I2c Commands, including setting the INT to high level, getting interrupts, getting OSD settings, returning firmware version, getting component upgrade status, getting serial number, requesting components, setting component events, and returning DFP status.

questions.question: What information is provided in the T24-40 i2c Command Spec section?
questions.justification: The synthesis states that the T24-40 i2c Command Spec section provides the i2c command specification for the T24-40 display, but does not provide any details about the specific commands.

questions.question: What UniUpdate I2c Commands are mentioned in the synthesis?
questions.justification: The synthesis lists several UniUpdate I2c Commands, including getting the number of displays, getting display information, getting sub-device information, specifying update conditions, notifying firmware image transfer completion, and notifying all firmware transfer completion.
